# Attempt to open file
text = ""
try:
    with open('/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        text = f.read()
except FileNotFoundError:
    # maybe the uploaded file is with other name
    import os, glob, json, textwrap, re, sys, math, random, itertools, collections
import os, glob, json, re, textwrap, itertools, collections, math, random, sys, inspect

with open('/mnt/data/file-WqxdApmYPiRhwRy5NRLo3U-Q047.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text[:500]
import re, json, unicodedata, textwrap, itertools

quotes = [(m.start(), m.end()) for m in re.finditer(r'"', text)]
quotes

pairs = []
for i in range(0, len(quotes), 2):
    pairs.append((quotes[i][0], quotes[i+1][0]))
pairs

cites = []
for start, end in pairs:
    cites.append(text[start+1:end])  # exclude quotes
cites

queries: فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى وثلاث ورباع
يا أيها النبي إنا أحللنا لك أزواجك
مَا كَانَ لِفُؤَادٍ أَنْ يَأْمَنَ مَا تُبْدِي لَهُ السَامِعُونَ
لَوْ كُنتُ أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ
لَوْ كُنتُ أُحِبُّ أَنْ أُكَلِّمَ مِثلَ أُكَلِّمُكَ
لو كنت أحب أن أكلم مثل

spans=[]
for start_quote, end_quote_char in pairs:
    spans.append((start_quote+1, end_quote_char))
spans
import json, re, textwrap, itertools, math, binascii

# Load quranic_verses.json to get the verse text
with open('/mnt/data/quranic_verses.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
# find surah_id 4 and ayah_id 3
verse_4_3 = next(item for item in quran_data if item['surah_id']==4 and item['ayah_id']==3)
verse4_3_text = verse_4_3['ayah_text']
verse4_3_text

queries: فانكحوا ما طاب لكم من النساء مثنى
مَا طَابَ لَكُمْ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ مَثْنَىٰ

output.code: verse4_3 = "وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَلَّا تُقْسِطُوا فِي الْيَتَامَىٰ فَانْكِحُوا مَا طَابَ لَكُمْ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ مَثْنَىٰ وَثُلَاثَ وَرُبَاعَ ۖ فَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَلَّا تَعْدِلُوا فَوَاحِدَةً أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ أَدْنَىٰ أَلَّا تَعُولُوا"

verse33_50 = "يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِنَّا أَحْلَلْنَا لَكَ أَزْوَاجَكَ اللَّاتِي آتَيْتَ أُجُورَهُنَّ وَمَا مَلَكَتْ يَمِينُكَ مِمَّا أَفَاءَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَبَنَاتِ عَمِّكَ وَبَنَاتِ عَمَّاتِكَ وَبَنَاتِ خَالِكَ وَبَنَاتِ خَالَاتِكَ اللَّاتِي هَاجَرْنَ مَعَكَ وَامْرَأَةً مُؤْمِنَةً إِنْ وَهَبَتْ نَفْسَهَا لِلنَّبِيِّ إِنْ أَرَادَ النَّبِيُّ أَنْ يَسْتَنْكِحَهَا خَالِصَةً لَكَ مِنْ دُونِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۗ قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا فَرَضْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ فِي أَزْوَاجِهِمْ وَمَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ لِكَيْلَا يَكُونَ عَلَيْكَ حَرَجٌ ۗ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا"

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
